title: cuphea subuligera
intro: Cuphea subuligera, also known as the bushy or creeping cuphea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lythraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cuphea subuligera include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Cuphea subuligera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
